name: Saigon Executive Wellness Retreat: Rejuvenation In 5 days
highlights: Begin your journey with a therapeutic massage package, designed to relieve fatigue and restore energy after a long flight
Experience acupuncture, cupping therapy, and therapeutic massage, combined with a detox dining experience for complete body balance
Unwind with a peaceful retreat to Can Gio, where lush mangroves provide the perfect setting for relaxation and rejuvenation

itinerary.title: Arrive in Saigon - Massage Package
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Tan Son Nhat International Airport, a friendly driver will be waiting to greet you with a warm welcome. You will be comfortably transferred to your hotel, where you can check in and take some time to unwind after your journey. Settle into your elegant room, refresh yourself, and enjoy a moment of relaxation before the next experience. After that, you will enjoy a recovery massage after a long flight, designed to relieve travel fatigue and restore energy. The massage package leaves you feeling refreshed, revitalized, and ready for your journey in Saigon.
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Comprehensive Health Check Package
itinerary.description:
On the second day, you meet healthcare professionals who guide you through your comprehensive health assessment. The experienced specialists will ensure your comfort during each examination. The standard package includes a 1/2 day check-up with 30 services. This option provides a thorough yet efficient general health assessment, including evaluation of organ functions and early detection of potentially serious health conditions:

Detection of conditions such as hypertension, elevated liver enzymes, high uric acid levels, metabolic syndrome, liver and biliary diseases, and thyroid disorders. Gy...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Recovery Therapy & Body Balance
itinerary.description: Your day begins with a focus on recovery therapy designed to restore your energy. You will experience a variety of treatments that aim to ease any tension and help you feel balanced. Enjoy a traditional Eastern medicine therapy session, designed to restore balance and enhance overall well-being. You will have the option to experience acupuncture, cupping therapy, or therapeutic massage, each tailored to your body’s needs. These treatments help improve circulation, release tension, and promote deep relaxation
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Relaxation & Nature Experience at Can Gio
itinerary.description:
Morning

Around 07:45, begin your adventure with a comfortable, air-conditioned van ride, traveling outside of the city to explore the natural beauty and wildlife of Can Gio Biosphere Reserve. Arrive at Monkey United, where you’ll get up close with long-tailed monkeys in their natural habitat. Enjoy watching them interact, climb, and explore as your guide shares insights into their behavior. Continue to the Crocodile Farm, home to massive, prehistoric reptiles. Witness their impressive strength and have a chance to see them eat
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Departure
itinerary.description: Your journey ends with a smooth airport transfer, ensuring a stress-free departure. Enjoy a final breakfast at your hotel, savoring the last moments of your wellness retreat.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during tour on air - conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
Meals as indicated in the program
Pre-examination with standard package ( You can upgrade to a higher package in the optional section )
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
